title: Alvida Returns Changed
description: On pages 5–8, alvida returns changed focuses on Luffy, Buggy, Alvida, Smoker as luffy explores the town of the Pirate King while Buggy and Alvida prepare revenge.
scene: On pages 5–8, alvida returns changed focuses on Luffy, Buggy, Alvida, Smoker as luffy explores the town of the Pirate King while Buggy and Alvida prepare revenge.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't tell me,

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: You've forgotten my face...?

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: W...what beauty!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: She's got to be the most beautiful woman for sure!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So pretty! (7

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: I don't know any pretty ladies like you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Who are you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I certainly haven't forgotten about you... after all, you were the first man to ever hit my beautiful face.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I hit your face?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: that way you handled me so roughly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It left me breathless.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Tell me, people!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Who is the most beautiful one among these seas!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That would of course be you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yes, it's me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There's no man in this world that won't kneel before me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But you see, I only love strong men.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'll have you be mine at last, Luffy. (7)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Shut up,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You're annoying.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Just who the heck are you?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You still don't realize!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: This is the police! You right there, freeze!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You're hereby under arrest for harming a police officer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: And as for you on the execution stand! Get down from there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You think you can arrest me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: S-Sir, I'm afraid she's too beautiful!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Who cares if she's beau- Tiful! Just arrest her!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: DIE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Aghhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: It's a Bamb!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: One of the broken fountain pieces is headed right for that woman!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Watch out!

summary: This part turns Loguetown into a trap, bringing old enemies and Marine pressure together around Luffy.
